---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do, and what's making it hard today? Start with
the user-visible pain point, not the proposed solution.

## Proposed change

What would you like to see happen? If you have more than one idea,
list them in order of preference.

## Alternatives considered

Anything you already tried or ruled out, and why.

## Scope check

`claude-voice-cue` intentionally stays small. Does this proposal fit
within the project's existing scope (voice cue for Claude Code input
events), or would it expand the scope? If it expands scope, why is
this the right project for it?

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, upstream docs — anything that would help evaluate
the request.
